attacking_style: Launches probing attacks in mid-distance range (approximately 3km from finish) on climbs, designed to test rivals rather than commit fully. Not a sustained long-range attacker.
team_tactics: EF demonstrates strong protective instincts: quick mechanical support and positioning work. Willing to redirect GC domestiques to alternative objectives when GC prospects fade.
terrain_preference: Medium-mountain stages where testing attacks can create selection without requiring explosive finishing power. Struggles when forced into pure explosive finishes.
vulnerability: Late-race crashes within 5km threaten GC due to time-cut risks. Probing attacks fail when rivals refuse to commit, leaving him exposed without sustained power advantage.
key_patterns: Mid-distance attacks (sub-3km) used tactically to test field, not for sustained separation (2 instances)
Team repurposed for non-GC goals when fading: domestique work for sprinters/stage hunters (2 instances)
Strong team crisis management: mechanical swaps and rule exploitation under pressure (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: By 2023 reduced to domestique duties for Van Aert, indicating GC competitiveness declined significantly from 2018-2020 probing role
